TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mark_Aguirre, title = Mark_Aguirre, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mark_Aguirre} }

S.FORM: Mark Aguirre sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 12, Mark Aguirre, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Mark Aguirre sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 12, Mark Aguirre, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mark aɣuirre s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, mark aɣuirre, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
